step_rationale: P2X7 drives neutrophil activation and sLOX-1 release, key inflammatory amplification in plaque.
mechanism: P2X7 receptor activation on neutrophils and macrophages amplifies plaque inflammation through inflammatory mediator release.

references.title: Abacavir causes leukocyte/platelet crosstalk by activating neutrophil P2X7 receptors thus releasing soluble lectin-like oxidized low-density lipoprotein receptor-1.
